--- layout: default title: Home ---

Welcome to atheist.dad, a space for writing about technology, art, science, opinion, and atheism from a secular perspective.

Tech

Technology, tools, software, and digital culture.

Art

Photography, drawing, painting, and visual creative work.

Science

Research, evidence, science news, and skeptical thinking.

Opinion

Personal perspective, commentary, and social reflection.

Atheism

Atheist identity, secular life, ethics, and worldview.
